title: Data Streams - Last Values
content:
# Data Streams - Last Values You can retrieve the last recorded values for any Asset / Data Stream pair. If you do not specify one or more Asset names in your prompt, then Kelvin AI will retrieve all Assets that have Data Stream values. ## Video Example See Kelvin AI in action for this widget.
## Written Example To start, click on the Kelvin AI menu and type a prompt similar to this; > give the last values for casing pressure Kelvin AI will use the Data Stream widget to provide an accurate answer.
summary: You can retrieve the last recorded values for any Asset / Data Stream pair.
